title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
